issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage.
Minor platform assumptions (bash scripts) limit cross-platform compatibility.
Missing checksum verification for downloaded model file.

scenarios.name: lora-image-generation
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B omits the required prompt tag, negative_prompt, and uses an unsupported payload structure.

scenarios.name: inpainting-with-mask
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits denoising_strength and does not show saving the output image.
